title: Electric Buses Were 56% Of EU City Bus Market In 2025
description:
At an electric vehicle ride and drive event for consumers, it seemed pretty clear the people who drove EVs themselves liked them and were interested or very interested. The decision-making process for everyday people involves much online research and personal test drives. While EVs in the US have become overly ... [continued]
